title: Your Favorite Eva
wikitext:
[]: Your Favorite Eva             Quote Post by unholyagent » Fri Mar 26, 2010 4:38 pm I know this has probably been up before, but anyway, which Eva is your favorite? Mine would have to be unit-1 because it's the coolest looking of them all

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Fri Mar 26, 2010 4:39 pm Shogouki Evangelion Unit 0-1 Eva-01 take your pick

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Fri Mar 26, 2010 4:42 pm MP Evangelions.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Fri Mar 26, 2010 4:48 pm Allemann wrote: MP Evangelions.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Mar 26, 2010 4:49 pm Allemann wrote: MP Evangelions.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Fri Mar 26, 2010 4:51 pm Xard wrote: well, their lips are alluring to say the least

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Fri Mar 26, 2010 4:52 pm Allemann wrote: They have a better design and appear to be "next generation" evangelions.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Fri Mar 26, 2010 4:53 pm Xard wrote: Incredibly freaky...

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Mar 26, 2010 5:57 pm Unit-69 ...I favor Provisional Unit-05 from Rebuild, Rebuild Unit-02, NGE Unit-03, and Rebuild Unit-03.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Fri Mar 26, 2010 7:55 pm I like Unit-00.

[]:             Quote Post by unholyagent » Fri Mar 26, 2010 8:44 pm Allemann wrote: MP Evangelions.

[]:             Quote Post by kirri » Fri Mar 26, 2010 8:59 pm Unit 01. It might even be my all-time favorite mech too.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Mar 26, 2010 9:06 pm Yui-sama. :3

[]:             Quote Post by WonderBug » Fri Mar 26, 2010 9:13 pm Unit 03. I hate the idea of collecting figures* but I love 03 enough to have a Revoltech figure of it sitting on my desk. * For me personally. It's cool for anyone else.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Mar 26, 2010 10:28 pm Unit 03 is a cool guy. He has stretchy arms and doesn't afraid of anything.

[]:             Quote Post by DIDDY » Sat Mar 27, 2010 1:43 am I CAN'T CHOOSE THEY'RE ALL COOL FOR DIFFERENT REASONS

[]:             Quote Post by Octahedron » Sat Mar 27, 2010 1:52 am Probably Unit 02. I like the red colour scheme and the head design. Unit 01's pretty awesome designs too, but I don't think purple and green is the best colour for humongous mecha. The MP Evas have a certain charm as well, being really weird and disturbing, which I consider a plus.

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Sat Mar 27, 2010 3:29 am Mana's Trident. *crickets*

[]:             Quote Post by Zeruel » Sat Mar 27, 2010 4:07 am The MP Eva's, there best weapon is fear. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Sat Mar 27, 2010 4:46 am The Harpies are vile, loathsome, predatory abominations and that's why they're my favorite.
summary:
[]: Your Favorite Eva             Quote Post by unholyagent » Fri Mar 26, 2010 4:38 pm I know this has probably been up before, but anyway, which Eva is your favorite? Mine would have to be unit-1 because it's the coolest looking of them all

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Fri Mar 26, 2010 4:39 pm Shogouki Evangelion Unit 0-1 Eva-01 take your pick
